changelog:
- Renamed 'Pixel XL' to 'Pixel' (sailfish), since the original Pixel is the only model that still grants unlimited Original-quality Photos backup
- Added Pixel 7 Pro, 8 Pro, 9 Pro XL, 10 Pro XL and feature flags through 2025 (incl. mid-year experience flags)
- Device selection sheet now shows a short subtitle describing what each spoof target actually unlocks in 2026 — split into Storage tier (Pixel → Pixel 5), dead zone (6/7), and AI tier (8 Pro+)
